title: prunus × lannesiana f. heteroflora
intro: Prunus × lannesiana f. heteroflora, also known as the Chinese flowering apricot or plum, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the Prunus genus. The plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. Its health benefits include reducing fever, relieving coughs and respiratory issues, and protecting against cardiovascular disease. In herbal preparations, the plant's bark, flowers, and leaves are often used to make teas, decoctions, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
